name: github-mcp
description: GitHub REST API integration for PR review workflows. Provides tools to fetch PR diffs, post review comments, manage inline annotations, apply labels, and query open PRs.

tools.name: get_pr_diff
tools.description: Fetch the raw unified diff for a pull request

tools.name: post_pr_comment
tools.description: Post a general markdown comment on a pull request

tools.name: post_inline_comment
tools.description: Post an inline review comment on a specific line of the PR diff

path.description: File path relative to repo root

line.description: Line number in the diff to annotate

tools.name: apply_pr_label
tools.description: Add or replace the review status label on a pull request

remove_existing_review_labels.description: Strip previous review labels before applying the new one

tools.name: get_pr_review_comments
tools.description: List all existing comments on a PR to detect prior bot reviews

tools.name: list_open_prs
tools.description: List all open pull requests in a repository with metadata
